title: Turkish police arrest more than 500 people at May Day rallies
summary_full: Turkey sees significant police deployments on 1 May each year, when marches led by workers and unions are held.
summary_public: Turkey sees significant police deployments on 1 May each year, when marches led by workers and unions are held.
